---
title: "CP-W06-2 - Group 2 Collaboration"
author: "Brian Vuong"
date: today
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-fold: false
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
---

# Topic

[Shopify Sales Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aliiihussain/shopify-sales-dataset-for-ml-and-eda)

# Research Question

"To what extent do marketing acquisition channels and applied discount levels influence the probability of a high-value customer conversion, and can these variables be utilized to build a predictive model for future customer acquisition?"

# Project Objectives

1.  To evaluate how marketing acquisition channels and applied discount levels influence high-value customer conversion, and to determine if these variables can be used to construct a predictive model for future customer acquisition.

# GitHub Repo

- <https://github.com/lewiswaddell/CP-W06-2-Group2.git>
